YUNO_MOD_CARD_YUNO_STRIKE_CARD.title: Strike
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YUNO_DEFEND_CARD.title: Defend
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YAN_HU_SHE_JI_CARD.title: Covering Fire
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CHU_XUE_CARD.title: Bleed
YUNO_MOD_CARD_DU_QI_CARD.title: Poison Gas
YUNO_MOD_CARD_DU_QI_CARD.description: Apply {TotalPoison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies. Permanently increase this amount by {PoisonPerTurn:diff()} each time it is played.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Foresee[/gold] 3. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Transfer your [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] to the target.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_HUI_HAO_HAO_ZUO_DE_CARD: {InCombat:Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage|Deal {BasePow:diff()} damage}. [gold]Sword[/gold] [gold]Stance[/gold]: Deal damage equal to base damage to the power of 2.5 instead.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QING_KONG_DAN_JIA_CARD.des: {InCombat:Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.|Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, repeated Y times. Y equals the number of [gold]Gun[/gold] cards played this combat.}
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YIN_BAO_CARD.title: Sonic Boom
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YIN_BAO_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies. If they already have [gold]Weak[/gold], apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] instead.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHA_WAN_LE_CARD.title: Finished Killing
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHA_WAN_LE_CARD.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. ALL enemies gain {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]. Double their [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XUE_JIAN_CARD.title: Blood Splash
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XUE_JIAN_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy has [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XU_ZHA_CARD.title: Deception
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XU_ZHA_CARD.description: Transfer your [gold]Cripple[/gold] to the target, then double its [gold]Cripple[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIE_YIN_CARD.title: Swift Sound
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BAO_HU_NI_CARD.title: Protect You
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BAO_HU_NI_CARD.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Values increase with [gold]Love[/gold] stacks.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NI_GEI_WO_XIAO_XIN_DIAN_CA: Whenever an enemy gains 1 [gold]Strength[/gold], you gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_LIANG_REN_CARD.title: Draw the Blade
YUNO_MOD_CARD_LIANG_REN_CARD.description: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Add all [gold]Sword[/gold] cards into your hand.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WU_YI_ZHONG_TING_CARD.desc: Whenever you enter a [gold]Stance[/gold], draw {Draw:diff()} cards.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QU_KAN_XING_XING_CARD.desc: Discard up to {Discard:diff()} cards. Gain 1 [gold]Love[/gold] for each card discarded. Draw cards equal to the number discarded.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIU_SHI_NI_CARD.title: It's You?
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIU_SHI_NI_CARD.descriptio: Remove all [gold]Strength[/gold] from the enemy. Gain that much [gold]Strength[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WEI_LAI_PIAN_CHA_CARD.desc: If current HP > 40% of Max HP: Take {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage (reducing HP to 40%), gain that much [gold]Bandage[/gold]. Otherwise: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_DIAN_JI_QIANG_CARD.title: Stun Gun
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YOU_NAI_JIU_WO_CARD.title: Yuno Save Me!
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIE_DU_JI_CARD.title: Antidote
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIE_DU_JI_CARD.description: Gain Energy equal to the number of [gold]Poisoned[/gold] enemies. If there is only 1 enemy, draw {Cards:diff()} cards instead.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIAO_HUAN_CARD.title: Exchange
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIAO_HUAN_CARD.description: Swap your [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn. If they are equal, double both.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_KAN_PO_CARD.title: See Through
YUNO_MOD_CARD_AI_YI_YI_CHU_CARD.title: Love Overflow
YUNO_MOD_CARD_AI_YI_YI_CHU_CARD.descript: [gold]Love[/gold] has no cap. You cannot gain [gold]Block[/gold] from cards.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_YOU_YU_CARD.title: Possessiveness
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_YOU_YU_CARD.descripti: Choose 1 card in your hand. Double its energy cost. It gains Replay 1.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_YOU_YU_CARD.selection: Choose 1 card. Double its energy cost. It gains Replay 1.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XUE_BAI_CARD.title: Blood Defeat
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XUE_BAI_CARD.description: Whenever an enemy takes damage from [gold]Bleed[/gold], gain {ZhiCanPowerCount:diff()} [gold]Cripple[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BIE_XIANG_TAO_CARD.title: Don't Even Think About Running
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BIE_XIANG_TAO_CARD.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add {GrtCardCount:diff()} cards from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your hand.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BIE_XIANG_TAO_CARD.selecti: Choose 1 card to add to your hand.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_TIAO_FEI_CARD.title: Flip Up
YUNO_MOD_CARD_TIAO_FEI_CARD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Choose 1 card in your hand to gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_TIAO_FEI_CARD.selectionScr: Choose 1 card in your hand to gain Retain.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NI_SHUO_SHEN_ME_CARD.title: What Did You Say!
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NI_SHUO_SHEN_ME_CARD.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIE_HOU_CARD.title: Encounter
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIE_HOU_CARD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Each time you gain [gold]Love[/gold], reduce this card's cost by 1.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_TUI_CARD.title: I Push
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_TUI_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain [gold]Love[/gold] equal to twice the unblocked damage dealt.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_CHUI_CARD.title: I Hammer
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_CHUI_CARD.description: ALL enemies lose {DownStrength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn. If there is only 1 enemy, they lose {DownAloneStrength:diff()} instead.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHI_HENG_CARD.title: Imbalance
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHI_HENG_CARD.description: Make your [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold] equal (take the higher value).
YUNO_MOD_CARD_PIAN_ZHI_CARD.title: Paranoia
YUNO_MOD_CARD_PIAN_ZHI_CARD.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card in your hand. Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to its cost.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHAN_GUANG_DAN_CARD.title: Flashbang
YUNO_MOD_CARD_PO_TING_CARD.title: Forced Stop
YUNO_MOD_CARD_PO_TING_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times. Add 1 card from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to your hand, then choose 1 card in your hand to discard.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_PO_TING_CARD.selectionScre: Choose 1 card from your draw pile to add to your hand.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CHAO_FU_HE_CARD.title: Overload
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CHAO_FU_HE_CARD.descriptio: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Discard 1 card. [gold]LingHuo[/gold]: Send {DiscardCount:diff()} cards from the top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to your [gold]discard pile[/gold], then draw 1 card.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_RUO_DIAN_JI_PO_CARD.title: Weakness Exploit
YUNO_MOD_CARD_RUO_DIAN_JI_PO_CARD.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to the enemy with the lowest HP {Repeat:diff()} times.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHI_SHOU_CARD.title: Slip
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHI_SHOU_CARD.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card from your [gold]discard pile[/gold]: Send {Cards:diff()} cards from the top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to your [gold]discard pile[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NA_QI_WEI_LAI_CARD.title: Take the Future
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NA_QI_WEI_LAI_CARD.descrip: Add {Add:diff()} [gold]Future Message[/gold] cards to your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XUN_QING_CARD.title: Double Suicide
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SAO_SHE_CARD.title: Strafe
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SAO_SHE_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BU_DAO_CARD.title: Coup de Grace
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BU_DAO_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times. If the enemy has [gold]Weak[/gold] and its HP is below {Threshold:diff()}, kill it.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIE_PO_CARD.title: Intimidation
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIE_PO_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy already has [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage again.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_FU_JI_CARD.title: Axe Strike
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHA_LE_NI_CARD.title: Kill You!
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHA_LE_NI_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. When you play a [gold]Dagger[/gold] attack, add this card from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your hand. Each time this card is played, its base damage increases by {Growth:diff()} this combat.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SI_SHA_CARD.title: Bloodbath
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SI_SHA_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, repeated Y times. Y equals the number of enemies in the room.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_DE_SHOU_CARD.title: Succeed
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIANG_XIN_WO_CARD.title: Trust Me
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YI_JIA_LUAN_ZHEN_CARD.desc: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card. Attack: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Skill: Play it. Power: Gain Energy equal to its cost.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CHENG_SHENG_ZHUI_JI_CARD.d: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. When you [gold]Foresee[/gold], add this card from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your hand. Each time this card is played, its damage increases by {Growth:diff()}.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIN_NI_YI_CI_CARD.title: Trust You Once
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIN_NI_YI_CI_CARD.descript: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Add 1 [gold]Future Message[/gold] to your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZOU_BA_CARD.title: Let's Go
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZOU_BA_CARD.description: Gain {LoveCount:diff()} [gold]Love[/gold]. Trigger the end-of-turn effect of [gold]Love[/gold] once.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHENG_ZHE_WEI_LAI_CARD.des: [gold]Foresee[/gold] 3. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Attack cards drawn gain [gold]Replay 1[/gold]. Remove after played.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QIU_TI_CARD.title: Orb
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QIU_TI_CARD.description: {InCombat:Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {CalculatedDamage:diff()} times. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.|Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, repeated equal to the number of Diaries held. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.}
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WEI_LAI_XUN_XI_CARD.title: Future Message
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHENG_YI_ZHI_XING_CARD.des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Lose 10% of Max HP. Gain [gold]Bandage[/gold] equal to the HP lost.{InCombat:
Lose {CalculatedDamage:diff()} HP|}
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BAD_END_CARD.title: Bad End
YUNO_MOD_CARD_BAD_END_CARD.description: Lose {Damage:diff()} HP. Draw until your hand is full. Attacks: Apply 1 [gold]Bleed[/gold] to ALL enemies. Skills: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Powers: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YI_JI_BI_SHA_CARD.title: One Shot Kill
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QU_SI_CARD.title: Go Die!
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CUI_XUE_CARD.title: Blood Quench
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CUI_XUE_CARD.description: When you deal damage with a [gold]Dagger[/gold] attack, trigger [gold]Bleed[/gold] {powerCount:diff()} times.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZI_SHANG_CARD.title: Self-Harm
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NI_MEI_YONG_LE_CARD.title: You're Useless Now
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NI_MEI_YONG_LE_CARD.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If this kills a non-minion enemy, gain {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIAN_JI_CARD.title: Trap
YUNO_MOD_CARD_XIAN_JI_CARD.description: Whenever you draw a card via an effect, apply {XianJiCount:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold] to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WEI_XIE_CARD.title: Threat
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WEI_XIE_CARD.description: Mark an enemy. At the end of the turn, they take 50% of the damage they received this turn. Attacking intent: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YIN_GUO_LV_DA_DIAN_TANG_CA: At the start of your turn, add 1 [gold]Orb[/gold] to your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_GU_WANG_CARD.title: Solitary Gaze
YUNO_MOD_CARD_GU_WANG_CARD.description: {InCombat:Transform up to {VaryCount:diff()} cards in your hand into [gold]Orbs[/gold].|Transform up to Y cards in your hand into [gold]Orbs[/gold]. Y equals the number of Diaries held.}
YUNO_MOD_CARD_GU_WANG_CARD.selectionScre: Choose any number of cards in your hand to transform into Orbs.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHONG_YAN_CARD.title: Finale
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHONG_YAN_CARD.description: Can only be played if you have more than 8 [gold]Love[/gold]. Gain 2 [gold]Love[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_GU_DU_ZOU_XIANG_YONG_YUAN_: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {CalculatedBlock:diff()} times (equal to total [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] stacks on ALL enemies). Each time you [gold]Foresee[/gold], reduce this card's cost by 2.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_HENG_QIE_CARD.title: Cross Cut
YUNO_MOD_CARD_HENG_QIE_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Double their [gold]Bleed[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YU_ZHI_CARD.title: Precognition
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YU_ZHI_CARD.description: Whenever you [gold]Foresee[/gold], ALL enemies gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold], then lose 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_AI_MU_CARD.title: Adoration
YUNO_MOD_CARD_AI_MU_CARD.description: If (hand size × 2 + [gold]discard pile[/gold] count) % energy spent = 0, gain X Energy, draw X cards, and gain {IfUpgraded:show:2X|X} [gold]Love[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_NI_ZHAO_SI_CARD.title: You're Asking for It!
ALL enemies gain {PowerCount:diff()} [gold]Cripple[/gold]. At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JIN_JI_ZHENG_YI_HU_HUAN_CA: Can only be played when HP is at or below 40%. Deal Y damage to ALL enemies. Y equals your current HP.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YI_YA_HUAN_YA_CARD.title: An Eye for an Eye
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YI_YA_HUAN_YA_CARD.descrip: Enemies that have damaged you gain 1 [gold]Revenge[/gold]. Damage you deal to yourself counts as coming from ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YU_ZHI_MENG_CARD.title: Prophetic Dream
YUNO_MOD_CARD_YU_ZHI_MENG_CARD.descripti: Cards drawn via [gold]Foresee[/gold] cost 0 this turn.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WAN_QIAN_LUN_HUI_CARD.desc: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Damage is based on the number of times you have played this game.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_HOU_BAO_ZA_CARD.title: Post-Battle Bandage
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_HOU_BAO_ZA_CARD.descr: When taking damage from enemies, gain {IfUpgraded:show:50%|25%} of that amount as [gold]Bandage[/gold]. When taking damage from yourself, gain the same amount as [gold]Bandage[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHI_SHI_YUAN_BO_CARD.title: Knowledgeable
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHI_SHI_YUAN_BO_CARD.descr: [gold]Retrieve[/gold] 1 rare card from a random class.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CI_TU_CARD.title: Thrust
YUNO_MOD_CARD_CI_TU_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Send the top 3 cards from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to your [gold]discard pile[/gold]. If any are Attacks, deal damage {Repeat:diff()} additional times.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_TAN_SHE_CARD.title: Ricochet
YUNO_MOD_CARD_TAN_SHE_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]LingHuo[/gold]: Deal {LingHuoDamage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_DAO_CARD.title: Take Cover
YUNO_MOD_CARD_WO_DAO_CARD.description: Discard your entire hand. Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card discarded.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JUE_YI_CARD.title: Resolve
YUNO_MOD_CARD_JUE_YI_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies Y times. Y equals your [gold]Love[/gold] stacks.{InCombat:
(Love stacks: {LoveCount:diff()})|}
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHOU_HU_CARD.title: Protect
YUNO_MOD_CARD_SHOU_HU_CARD.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Love[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_LIAN_XI_CARD.title: Compassion
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHU_MU_CARD.title: Attention
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHU_MU_CARD.description: Auto-play when you gain [gold]Love[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_CARD.title: Slash
YUNO_MOD_CARD_ZHAN_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Damage increases by the sum of the previous two times this card's base damage was dealt.
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QI_DAO_CARD.title: Pray
YUNO_MOD_CARD_QI_DAO_CARD.description: Add all cards from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your [gold]draw pile[/gold], then send all cards from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to your [gold]discard pile[/gold].
